session.assistant:
## Test Results Summary
### 1. test_reopen_contested_threads.py **pytest passed: 16 tests passed in 0.31s**
All tests in this module passed successfully.
### 2. test_resolve_review_threads.py **pytest passed: 15 tests passed in 0.18s**
All tests in this module passed successfully.
### 3. packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/github/ **pytest failed: 7 errors during collection**
This test suite has import/collection errors preventing test execution:
| File | Error Type | Details | |------|-----------|---------| | test_execute_gh_command_with_retry.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.time.FakeTime` | | test_github_checks.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.github_issues.FakeGitHubIssues` | | test_issues_fake.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.github_issues.FakeGitHubIssues` | | test_objective_issues.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.branch_manager.FakeBranchManager` | | test_parsing.py | ImportError | Cannot import `parse_plan_number_from_url` from `erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing` | | test_pr_review_threads.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.github.FakeLocalGitHub` | | test_retry.py | ModuleNotFoundError | Cannot import `tests.fakes.gateway.time.FakeTime` |
The root issues are: 1. Missing `tests.fakes` module (not available from the erk-shared test context) 2. Missing function `parse_plan_number_from_url` in the parsing module
